title: Nick Polom reaches divorce agreement with Malena Tudi following $400,000 legal battle but one settlement detail grabs attention
summary_full: Nick Polom, better known as Nmplol, has finalized his no-fault divorce from fellow streamer Malena Tudi. According to Dexerto, most assets were divided equally, while Starforge Systems received separate treatment. The court also denied Tudi’s request for monthly spousal support. The outcome has sparked online debate about alimony, asset division, and the financial cost of public breakups.
